title: <AgentName> Output
description: Output schema for <AgentName> v1. The 'status', 'agent_id', and 'phase_trace' fields are always present. 'result' is present on success; 'error' is present on failure; 'partial_result' is present on degraded execution.

status.description: Top-level outcome of the agent invocation.

agent_id.description: The manifest ID of the agent that produced this output.

invocation_id.description: Unique identifier for this invocation. Used for tracing and replay.

phase_trace.description: Ordered list of phases that executed during this invocation.

result.description: Present when status is 'success'. Replace with agent-specific result schema.

partial_result.description: Present when status is 'degraded'. Contains whatever the agent was able to produce.

code.description: Structured error code per Section 11.5.1 classification.

message.description: Human-readable error description. Never includes PII or credentials.

field.description: Input field associated with the error, if applicable.

retry_eligible.description: Whether the caller may safely retry this invocation.

docs_url.description: Link to internal documentation for this error code.

metadata.description: Pass-through of caller-supplied metadata from the input envelope.
